title: SAP Ariba Purchase Order
description: JSON Schema for an SAP Ariba Purchase Order document representing a buyer's commitment to purchase goods or services from a supplier through the SAP Business Network. Based on the SAP Ariba Procurement API data model documented at https://help.sap.com/docs/ariba-apis and the Purchase Order web service schemas.

orderId.description: Unique purchase order identifier (UniqueName) including version number. This is the primary key for the purchase order in SAP Ariba.

erpPONumber.description: ERP system purchase order number (ERPPONumber). Defines the unique ID for every version of the purchase order in the backend ERP system.

versionNumber.description: Supplemental version number of the original order. Incremented with each change request or modification.

orderDate.description: Date and time when the purchase order was created (ISO 8601 format).

status.description: Current status of the purchase order in the procurement lifecycle.

orderMethodCategory.description: Defines the ordering method category for the purchase order indicating how it was generated (e.g., manual entry, automatic from requisition, blanket release).

supplier.description: The supplier from whom goods or services are being purchased.

buyer.description: The buyer organization placing the purchase order.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code defining the type of currency used for the purchase order.

totalAmount.description: Total monetary value of the purchase order including all line items.

taxAmount.description: Total tax amount for the purchase order.

paymentTerms.description: Payment terms governing when and how invoices against this order should be paid. References the unique payment terms code assigned to the supplier.

purchaseOrg.description: Purchasing organization identifier (PurchaseOrg/UniqueName). Defines the unique purchase organization responsible for this order.

purchaseGroup.description: Purchasing group identifier (PurchaseGroup/UniqueName). Defines the unique purchase group handling this order.

companyCode.description: Company code for the buying legal entity.

shipTo.description: Default shipping address for the purchase order. Can be overridden at the line item level.

lineItems.description: Line items contained in the purchase order. Each line item represents a specific good or service being procured.

deletedLineItems.description: Line items that have been deleted in a change order. Contains the line numbers of removed items.

numberOnPO.description: The line number of the deleted line item (NumberOnPOString).

requisitionId.description: Reference to the originating purchase requisition that generated this order.

contractId.description: Reference to a master agreement or contract against which this order is placed.

comments.description: Header-level comments or notes on the purchase order.

headerText.description: Structured header text elements for SAP integration.

customFields.description: Custom field extensions for organization-specific data requirements.

createdDate.description: Timestamp when the order was first created in the system.

lastModifiedDate.description: Timestamp of the most recent modification.

closedDate.description: Timestamp when the order was closed.

Money.description: Monetary amount with currency code following ISO 4217. Represents price and amount values throughout the purchase order.

Address.description: Postal address structure used for ShipTo, BillTo, and RemitTo addresses. Fields align with the SAP Ariba PostalAddress structure.

lines.description: Street address lines containing the valid shipping or billing address.

city.description: City name where goods need to be shipped or invoices directed.

postalCode.description: Postal or ZIP code of the area.

UnitOfMeasure.description: Unit of measure specification. Uses UN/ECE Recommendation 20 standard codes or SAP Ariba internal codes.

code.description: Unit of measure code (UN/ECE Rec 20 or SAP internal).

CommodityCode.description: UNSPSC commodity classification code used to classify goods and services on line items.

AccountingInfo.description: Accounting assignment (split accounting) information for distributing line item costs across multiple cost objects. Corresponds to the SplitAccountings element in SAP Ariba.

costCenter.description: Cost center identifier for expenditure allocation (CostCenter).

amount.description: Amount allocated to this accounting assignment.

percentage.description: Percentage of line item amount allocated to this accounting assignment.

accountCategory.description: Account assignment category code for the line item expenditure (AccountCategory/UniqueName).

sapSerialNumber.description: SAP serial number for the accounting split entry.

TaxDetail.description: Tax calculation details for a line item. References the tax code per evaluated receipt settlement agreements.

taxCategory.description: Tax category (e.g., VAT, GST, Sales Tax).

taxableAmount.description: Amount on which tax is calculated.

PaymentTerms.description: Payment terms specifying when and how invoices against this purchase order should be paid. References PaymentTerms/UniqueName in SAP Ariba.

code.description: Unique code of the supplier payment terms (PaymentTerms/UniqueName).

examples: 2% discount if paid within 10 days, net 30 days

netDays.description: Number of days until payment is due.

discountDays.description: Number of days within which the discount applies.

SupplierReference.description: Reference to a supplier on the SAP Ariba Network. The supplierId corresponds to the Supplier/UniqueName field.

supplierId.description: Supplier unique number (Supplier/UniqueName). AN-ID on the Ariba Network or internal supplier number.

erpSupplierId.description: Supplier number in the ERP system.

BuyerReference.description: Reference to the buyer organization placing the purchase order.

buyerId.description: Buyer AN-ID on the SAP Ariba Network.

erpBuyerId.description: Buyer identifier in the ERP system.

PurchaseOrderLineItem.description: A line item within a purchase order representing a specific good or service being procured. Corresponds to the ERPOrder line detail elements in SAP Ariba.

numberOnPO.description: Line item number within the purchase order (NumberOnPOString). Unique within the order.

description.description: Description of the item or service being purchased (Description/Description).

unitPrice.description: Price per unit of measure (Description/Price/Amount). Defines the net amount of each line item.

unitOfMeasure.description: Unit of measure for the line item (Description/UnitOfMeasure/UniqueName).

netAmount.description: Net line item amount (quantity multiplied by unit price).

commodityCode.description: UNSPSC commodity code for the line item (CommodityCode/UniqueName).

itemCategory.description: Item category code distinguishing material, service, or other item types (ItemCategory/UniqueName).

accountCategory.description: Account assignment category for the line item expenditure (AccountCategory/UniqueName).

needByDate.description: Requested delivery date for the line item (NeedByDateString) in ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format.

shipTo.description: Line-item-level shipping address overriding the header ShipTo.

accountings.description: Split accounting assignments for distributing costs across multiple cost objects (SplitAccountings).

receivingType.description: Receiving type value indicating how receipts should be processed for this line item (ReceivingType).

taxCode.description: Tax code per evaluated receipt settlement agreements (TaxCode/UniqueName).

taxDetail.description: Detailed tax information for this line item.

itemOnRequisition.description: Line number of the corresponding item in the originating requisition (ItemOnReq).

serviceStartDate.description: Service period start date for service line items.

serviceEndDate.description: Service period end date for service line items.

lineText.description: Structured text elements for the line item (SAPOrderInfo). Used for SAP-specific text types.

scheduleLines.description: Delivery schedule lines for the line item.

comments.description: Additional comments or notes on the line item.

customFields.description: Custom field extensions for organization-specific line item data.

TextElement.description: Structured text element for SAP integration. Contains indexed text entries with type identifiers corresponding to SAPOrderInfo elements.

ScheduleLine.description: Delivery schedule line specifying when partial quantities should be delivered.

deliveryDate.description: Planned delivery date for this schedule line.

quantity.description: Quantity to be delivered on this schedule line.

CustomFields.description: Custom field extensions supporting organization-specific data requirements. SAP Ariba supports custom fields of various types (boolean, date, integer, money, string) that are configured per tenant. Not all fields are available by default; certain fields need to be added in the Ariba system configuration.

examples.comments: Urgent order for Q3 production requirements
